High School Musical 3: Senior Year (2008)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $90,559,416Details
International Box Office $183,833,464
Worldwide Box Office $274,392,880
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $65,564,991
Total $65,564,991
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$42,030,184 (46.4% of total gross)
Legs:2.15 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:33.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$11,000,000 (worldwide box office is 24.9 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,623 opening theaters/3,626 max. theaters, 5.5 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $150,824,451

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: October 24th, 2008 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: June 20th, 2025 (Limited), released as High School Musical 3 (Re-release) (Spain)
Video Release: February 17th, 2009 by Walt Disney Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: G
Running Time: 112 minutes
Franchise: High School Musical
Plot point: Romance
Social setting: High School
Subgenre: Comedy Drama, Family Musical
Target audience: Tween
Source:Based on TV
Genre:Musical
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Walt Disney Pictures, Borden and Rosenbush Entertainment
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
